summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Systemic Architect digital headquarters. Backend APIs working well (90% success rate), frontend fully functional with all navigation, email capture, blog filtering, and product showcase features working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 500 error - Failed to fetch lists
flaky_endpoints.impact: EmailOctopus integration not working, but fallback to MongoDB subscription works
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Email subscription falls back to MongoDB storage successfully

passed_tests: Homepage loads with glitch text effect headline
Navigation links work: COMMAND, DEPOT, BRIEFINGS, THE_STACK
Depot page shows product mockup and System Specifications
Briefings page loads blog posts with tags [STRATEGY], [AUTOMATION], [MONETIZATION]
Blog post filtering by tag works perfectly
Individual blog post page loads with content and suggested posts
The Stack page shows affiliate resources grid with category filtering
Footer shows system status indicator: STATUS: ONLINE
Payhip checkout placeholder modal works as expected
action_item_for_main_agent: EmailOctopus API integration returning 500 error - check API key validity or network connectivity. This is non-critical as email subscription fallback to MongoDB works correctly.
